For Earth Protectors aged 6–11

Enter the Agency

Gaia’s Secret Agents is a mission-based environmental subscription movement that empowers children to take real-world action for the planet through hands-on challenges, storytelling, and community impact.

A screen-free adventure that helps children build purpose, confidence, responsibility, leadership, and real-world care for the planet.

Join the Mission Get the Free Recruit Kit

Our Mission

Why We Exist

Kids hear about climate change.

But they rarely get the tools to do something about it.

Gaia’s Secret Agents transforms worry into action — giving children practical missions they can complete at home, in their neighbourhood, and in their community.

Because change doesn’t start with governments.

It starts with families.

The Bigger Vision

The Bigger Vision

When thousands of children take small actions each month, the impact multiplies.

Less waste.
More awareness.
Stronger habits.

A generation raised to care — and act.

Purpose · Leadership · Future Careers

More Than a Mission Pack

Chosen · Capable · Ready

It gives them purpose.

Gaia’s Secret Agents gives children more than activities. Every mission is designed to help children build curiosity, responsibility, confidence, problem-solving, and leadership — the same qualities they will need as the future scientists, engineers, explorers, conservationists, and changemakers of tomorrow.

Earth ProtectorChosen to notice.
Trained to care.
Ready to act.
Hopeful

Children are not told the world is broken.

Empowering

They are invited to help.

Chosen

They are chosen to notice, investigate, care, and act.

Through story-led missions, real-world challenges, and collectible agent rewards, children begin to see themselves as capable Earth Protectors — not someday, but now.

This is where environmental education becomes something bigger: a pathway into purpose, leadership, and future careers that help protect the planet.

CuriosityAsk better questions.
ResponsibilityTake real-world action.
ConfidenceSee themselves as capable.
LeadershipBegin with small choices.

Environmental education with a future.

Each mission quietly builds the skills behind leadership: observation, curiosity, care, responsibility, and action.

The Agent Journey

How It Works

Each month, a new mission arrives.

Inside every Gaia’s Secret Agents pack, children step into a story-led adventure where they follow clues, meet field agents, complete hands-on challenges, and take real-world action for the planet.

1

The Mission Arrives

A new case file is released. Your child becomes part of the agency and enters a world of mystery, nature, and discovery.

2

The Story Begins

Agents follow the mission through character-led storytelling, guided by field agents like Kai and Flip.

3

The Investigation Starts

Children explore the mission through field guides, secret codes, creative pages, and hands-on challenges designed to make learning feel alive.

4

The Real-World Action

Every mission includes one practical action children can complete at home, outside, or in their community.

5

The Agent Reward

At the end of each mission, agents collect their mission rewards.

No dry worksheets. No doom and gloom. Just curiosity, purpose, and action.
Including collectable premium character cards and secret agent badge.

Begin Mission 01

Mission 01

Mission 01: Operation Blue Planet

A classified ocean adventure for young Earth Protectors.

Mission 01: Operation Blue Planet is a classified ocean adventure for young Earth Protectors. Inside, agents join Kai the ancient sea turtle and Flip the dolphin to investigate a mysterious message from the deep sea. Through five hands-on missions, creature cards, secret codes, and real-world action, children learn that they do not need to live near the ocean to help protect it.

Mission 01 unlocks: Curiosity.

Because every Earth Protector starts by noticing what others miss.

Parents / FAQ

Designed for children. Built with parents in mind.

What age is it for?

Gaia’s Secret Agents is designed for children aged 6–11.

Does my child need to live near the ocean?

No. Mission 01 is designed so children can help protect the ocean from home, outside, or in their community.

Is it scary or doom-focused?

No. The tone is hopeful, purposeful, and action-based.

What does it build?

Purpose, curiosity, responsibility, confidence, problem-solving, leadership, and real-world care for the planet.

Top Secret — Eyes Only

Will you answer the call?

The first mission begins with the ocean.
